meanings.definition: a choice that is made by counting the number of people in favor of each alternative
examples: there were only 17 votes in favor of the motion
they allowed just one vote per person

meanings.definition: express one's preference for a candidate or for a measure or resolution; cast a vote
examples: None of the Democrats voted last night

meanings.definition: express one's choice or preference by vote

examples: I vote that we all go home
She voted for going to the Chinese restaurant

meanings.definition: bring into existence or make available by vote
examples: They voted aid for the underdeveloped countries in Asia
